---
title: "Game examples"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

Here is a showcase of games that have been produced with the [EcoKnowGames Creator](https://github.com/EcoKnowGames/creator) tool.
This will be a paragraph giving some context to the games, talking about the integration of scientific models, and briefly explaining their common features.
Below are a suite of games that will include links very soon.


Conservation management
==============================

Conservation games (Play here) are games that focus on achieving conservation goals in situations of limited resources and conservation conflict.


Chesapeake Play!
===============================

Chesapeake Play! (Play here) is a game about managing blue crabs in the Chesapeake bay.


Copper Tailings Rehabilitation
===============================

Copper Tailings Rehabilitation (Play here) focuses on restoration of heavy metal contaminated land.
